text:
Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$\sum\limits_{j = -2}^{n-4} j^{j+7}$
.

Select the summation expression that is equivalent to the sum
$4^3 + 6^3 + 8^3 + \cdots + 28^3$
.

Select the value of the sum
$\sum\limits_{k = -2}^3 k^2$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$\sum\limits_{j = 0}^{n-2} 2^{j+1}$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$2 + 6 + 18 + 54 + \cdots + 2 \cdot 3^{15}$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$2 + 5 + 8 + 11 + \cdots + (2+ 3 \cdot 22))$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$4 + 20 + 100 + 500 + \cdots + 4 \cdot 5^{47}$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$\sum\limits_{j = 2}^{n - 1} (j+1)^3$
.

Select the summation expression that  is equivalent to the sum
$5^2 + 7^2 + 9^2 + \cdots + 201^2$
.

Select the mathematical expression that is equivalent to the sum
$\sum\limits_{j =0}^{n+2} 3^{j-3}$
.
